title: [WIP] Add the ability to test with podman-cgroup-manager = systemd

comments.body:
:boom: Invalid `.papr.yml`: failed to parse 4th testsuite: Schema validation failed:
 - Value 'conmon' is not unique. Previous path: '/packages/3'. Path: '/packages/25'.
 - Value 'golang-github-cpuguy83-go-md2man' is not unique. Previous path: '/packages/10'. Path: '/packages/22'..

:boom: Invalid `.papr.yml`: failed to parse 4th testsuite: Schema validation failed:
 - Value 'conmon' is not unique. Previous path: '/packages/3'. Path: '/packages/25'.
 - Value 'golang-github-cpuguy83-go-md2man' is not unique. Previous path: '/packages/10'. Path: '/packages/22'..

Once this gets in, we need to make the cgroupfs manager an explicit option for the containerized tests - the default will be swapping to systemd with my PR.

Also would not be surprised it the systemd tests are failing right now.

See if this fixes the permission problem. First line is for debugging purposes.
```
# id -Z 
# chcon -t container_file_t  ./.papr_test.sh
# runcon system_u:system_r:spc_t:s0 ./.papr_test.sh
```
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 8e25b5d) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
